tasks.description: Crate scaffold: create apps/cli-composition directory with Cargo.toml (declaring domain / usecase / infrastructure dependencies), add "apps/cli-composition" to the workspace root Cargo.toml members list, and add the cli_composition layer entry to architecture-rules.json (may_depend_on: ["domain","infrastructure","usecase"], tddd.enabled: false). Also create apps/cli-composition/src/lib.rs as an empty or minimal stub so the crate compiles. Also update deny.toml to add cli_composition as an allowed dependent for the infrastructure, usecase, and domain bans (intermediate state: add "cli_composition" to wrappers for infrastructure, usecase, and domain alongside the existing allowed wrappers). This intermediate deny.toml update is required so that cargo make deny accepts the new cli_composition crate's dependencies on those layers — without this update deny.toml would reject cli_composition → infrastructure / usecase / domain. apps/cli/Cargo.toml is NOT changed in this task; the enforcement flip (removing cli from wrappers, removing infrastructure/usecase from apps/cli) is deferred to T006. After this task cargo make ci must pass (the new crate compiles, architecture-rules-verify-sync sees the new member, verify-arch-docs sees no drift, cargo make deny accepts cli_composition deps). Covers IN-01, IN-02, AC-01, AC-02.

CliApp facade skeleton: implement CliApp struct and CommandOutcome type in apps/cli-composition/src/lib.rs. CommandOutcome carries stdout: Option<String>, stderr: Option<String>, exit_code: u8 — all primitive. CliApp is a unit struct with pub fn new() -> Self. Add stub method signatures for ALL command families (review_v2: review_run_codex, review_run_claude, review_run_local, review_check_approved, review_results, review_classify, review_files, review_validate_scope, review_get_briefing, review_persist_commit_hash; guard: guard_check; hook: hook_dispatch; domain: domain_export_schema; git: git commands; track: track commands including tddd subcommands; verify: verify commands; pr/pr_tests: pr commands; make non-review: any remaining make subcommands not covered by review_persist_commit_hash) — each returns Result<CommandOutcome, String> and returns Err(String::from("not implemented")) as a temporary placeholder (not unimplemented!() — library code must not panic per the No Panics convention). The public method signatures must use only String / &str / PathBuf / primitive / CommandOutcome / composition-defined input DTO parameters — no usecase / domain / infrastructure types on the public face (CN-02). The stub must compile so cargo make ci passes. The actual composition logic is wired in T003-T005; this task only establishes the public API contract for ALL command families so that T006 can remove all infrastructure/usecase deps from apps/cli. Covers IN-03, CN-02.

Move libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/cli_composition.rs (1507 lines) to apps/cli-composition/src/review_v2/ and split into sub-modules each ≤700 lines. Suggested sub-modules based on contextual boundaries in the source: shared.rs (build_v2_shared, resolve_diff_base, NullDiffGetter, ReviewV2Composition*, CodexReviewOutcome), scope.rs (build_scope_query_interactor_str, build_scope_query_interactor_no_diff_str, validate_scope_for_track_str, load_scope_config_only, load_scope_config_only_str, validate_track_id_str, validate_review_group_name_str), run.rs (run_codex_review_str, run_claude_review_str, build_review_v2, build_review_v2_str, build_review_v2_with_reviewer, build_review_v2_with_reviewer_str, build_review_v2_with_claude_reviewer, build_review_v2_with_claude_reviewer_str, resolve_diff_base_and_getter), approved.rs (check_approved_str, build_check_approved_service, count_findings_in_verdict_json), results.rs (render_review_results_str, build_run_review_service), briefing.rs (get_briefing_for_scope_str, append_scope_briefing_reference_str), and mod.rs (public re-exports for the sub-module items). Also move NullReviewer from infrastructure::review_v2::null_reviewer (inline mod in mod.rs) to apps/cli-composition/src/review_v2/null_reviewer.rs. Delete libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/cli_composition.rs after copying to apps/cli-composition. To keep existing apps/cli callers compiling (CN-05, IN-07): add cli_composition as a dependency to apps/cli/Cargo.toml and place a re-export shim in apps/cli/src/commands/review/compose_v2.rs that re-exports from cli_composition:: instead of infrastructure::review_v2:: — the shim is placed in apps/cli (NOT in libs/infrastructure) because adding cli_composition as a dep of libs/infrastructure would create a circular crate dependency (infrastructure -> cli_composition -> infrastructure). Also update architecture-rules.json: add cli_composition to cli.may_depend_on so that sotp verify layers accepts the intermediate state where cli depends on both cli_composition and infrastructure/usecase (intermediate state: cli.may_depend_on = ["infrastructure","usecase","cli_composition"]). This intermediate architecture-rules.json update is required so that check-layers (cargo make ci includes check-layers) does not reject the cli → cli_composition dependency introduced in this task. The final enforcement flip (cli.may_depend_on = ["cli_composition"] only) is done in T006. Also update deny.toml: add "cli" to cli_composition wrappers so cargo make deny accepts apps/cli → cli_composition (intermediate state). cargo make ci must pass after this task. The CliApp stub methods from T002 remain as Err(String::from("not implemented")) placeholders until T004 fills them in. Covers IN-05, IN-07, CN-03, CN-05. Note: IN-06 is NOT yet complete after T003 because persist_commit_hash_for_track (a composition helper) remains in libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs; IN-06 is completed in T005 when that function is moved to apps/cli-composition.

Wire review command group into CliApp facade: replace direct infrastructure::review_v2:: calls in apps/cli/src/commands/review/ (codex_local.rs, claude_local.rs, local.rs, results.rs, classify.rs, files.rs, mod.rs for check-approved) with cli_composition::CliApp method calls. Import cli_composition crate in apps/cli/Cargo.toml (add as dependency alongside the existing infrastructure / usecase deps — do not remove infra/usecase yet). Fill in the corresponding CliApp methods in apps/cli-composition/src/lib.rs (delegating to apps/cli-composition/src/review_v2/ internals), replacing the Err("not implemented") placeholders introduced by T002. The apps/cli layer should no longer directly import infrastructure::review_v2 inside the review/ submodule after this task (though the Cargo.toml still declares infrastructure as a dependency until T006). apps/cli/src/commands/review/compose_v2.rs re-exports are also replaced by cli_composition imports. cargo make ci must pass. Covers IN-03, IN-05 (review command family migration), CN-02, CN-05.

Wire ALL remaining command families into CliApp facade (guard, hook, domain, git, track/tddd, verify, pr, and make.rs non-review parts): (a) Move persist_commit_hash_for_track from libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs to apps/cli-composition/src/review_v2/ (its doc comment describes it as a composition-layer helper that encapsulates domain type construction for the CLI layer — it belongs in cli_composition, not infrastructure). After the move, libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs contains only the adapter types listed in AC-07 (CodexReviewer, ClaudeReviewer, GitDiffGetter, SystemReviewHasher, FsReviewStore, FsCommitHashStore, load_v2_scope_config). (b) Fill in CliApp stub methods (introduced in T002) for ALL remaining command families: guard (guard_check), hook (hook_dispatch), domain (domain_export_schema), git (git command group), track (track + tddd subcommands), verify (verify commands), pr/pr_tests, and make non-review subcommands — each method delegates to the corresponding composition logic in apps/cli-composition/src/<group>/. (c) Replace the direct infrastructure:: / usecase:: calls in apps/cli/src/commands/{guard,hook,domain.rs,git.rs,verify.rs,pr.rs,pr_tests.rs,make.rs,track/} with cli_composition::CliApp method calls. After this task, all direct infrastructure:: and usecase:: imports in apps/cli/src/ are gone (Cargo.toml deps still present until T006). cargo make ci must pass. Covers IN-03, IN-05 (make and all remaining command families), CN-02, CN-05.

Enforcement flip (final commit): (1) Verify libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs contains only adapter types (CodexReviewer, ClaudeReviewer, GitDiffGetter, SystemReviewHasher, FsReviewStore, FsCommitHashStore, load_v2_scope_config) — persist_commit_hash_for_track was moved to apps/cli-composition in T005; libs/infrastructure/Cargo.toml has no cli_composition dependency. (2) Update apps/cli/Cargo.toml: remove the workspace layer dependencies on infrastructure and usecase, keeping cli_composition = { path = "../../apps/cli-composition" } as the sole workspace layer dependency (external crate deps such as clap / anyhow remain unchanged; all infrastructure:: and usecase:: imports were already replaced in T004-T005). (3) Update architecture-rules.json: change cli.may_depend_on from the intermediate ["infrastructure","usecase","cli_composition"] (set in T003) to the final ["cli_composition"] only. (4) Update deny.toml to complete the enforcement flip from the intermediate state set in T001 (infrastructure.wrappers=["cli","cli_composition"], usecase.wrappers=["infrastructure","cli","cli_composition"], domain.wrappers=["usecase","infrastructure","cli_composition"]) to the final state: change infrastructure.wrappers to ["cli_composition"] (remove "cli"); change usecase.wrappers to ["infrastructure","cli_composition"] (remove "cli"); domain.wrappers stays ["usecase","infrastructure","cli_composition"]; add a new cli_composition ban entry with wrappers=["cli"]. (5) Run cargo make ci as the final gate to confirm AC-04 through AC-14. Covers IN-04, IN-07, IN-08, CN-01, CN-04, AC-04..AC-14.

sections.title: crate scaffold: workspace registration + architecture-rules.json エントリ追加
description: apps/cli-composition ディレクトリを新設し、Cargo.toml（domain / usecase / infrastructure 依存）と最小限の src/lib.rs を作成する (IN-01, IN-02)。

workspace ルートの Cargo.toml members に "apps/cli-composition" を追加し、architecture-rules.json に cli_composition 層エントリ（may_depend_on: ["domain","infrastructure","usecase"]、tddd.enabled: false）を追加する (IN-01, IN-02)。

deny.toml を中間更新: infrastructure / usecase / domain の wrappers に "cli_composition" を追加して cargo make deny が新 crate の依存を受け入れるようにする (中間状態)。apps/cli/Cargo.toml は変更しない — cli 側の enforcement flip は T006 で一括実施 (IN-07, CN-01)。
この時点で cargo make ci が緑を維持することを確認する (CN-05)。

sections.title: CliApp facade + CommandOutcome の公開 API 骨格（全コマンドファミリーのスタブ）
description: apps/cli-composition/src/lib.rs に CliApp struct と CommandOutcome 型を定義する (IN-03)。
CommandOutcome は stdout: Option<String> / stderr: Option<String> / exit_code: u8 のみを持つ primitive DTO (CN-02)。

CliApp の全コマンドファミリー（review_v2 / guard / hook / domain / git / track+tddd / verify / pr）のメソッドをスタブ実装（Err(String::from("not implemented")) を返す fallible stub）で API 面のみ確定する — 内部実装は T003-T005 で埋める (IN-03)。unimplemented!() ではなく fallible stub を使う点に注意（library code の No Panics 規約）。
公開 API に usecase / domain / infrastructure 型を出さないことを確認する (CN-02)。

sections.title: review_v2 composition logic の移動・分割と apps/cli 側 re-export shim 配置
description: libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/cli_composition.rs（1507 行）を apps/cli-composition/src/review_v2/ へ移動し、shared / scope / run / approved / results / briefing / null_reviewer の各サブモジュールに分割する（各ファイル ≤700 行）(IN-05, CN-03)。
NullReviewer を infrastructure の inline mod から apps/cli-composition/src/review_v2/null_reviewer.rs へ移動する (IN-05)。
libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/cli_composition.rs は削除する。

既存の apps/cli callers がコンパイルを維持するために（CN-05, IN-07）: apps/cli/Cargo.toml に cli_composition 依存を追加し、apps/cli/src/commands/review/compose_v2.rs に cli_composition:: からの re-export shim を配置する。shim は apps/cli 内（libs/infrastructure 内ではない）に置く — libs/infrastructure に cli_composition 依存を追加すると infrastructure → cli_composition → infrastructure の循環依存が生じるため。

architecture-rules.json を中間更新: cli.may_depend_on に cli_composition を追加（中間状態: ["infrastructure","usecase","cli_composition"]）— この変更がないと check-layers が cli → cli_composition 依存を拒否して cargo make ci が失敗する。最終的な cli.may_depend_on = ["cli_composition"] への変更は T006 で実施。
libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs はまだ adapter 型と persist_commit_hash_for_track (composition helper) の両方を公開している。IN-06 の完全な達成は T005 で persist_commit_hash_for_track を cli-composition へ移動した後。
cargo make ci が緑を維持することを確認する (CN-05)。

sections.title: review コマンド群を CliApp facade 経由に移行（compose_v2.rs shim を直接 CliApp 呼び出しに置き換え）
description: apps/cli/src/commands/review/ 以下の各ファイル（codex_local.rs / claude_local.rs / local.rs / results.rs / classify.rs / files.rs / mod.rs の check-approved 部分）が compose_v2.rs shim 経由で参照している箇所を cli_composition::CliApp メソッド呼び出しに直接置き換える (IN-03, IN-05)。
apps/cli-composition/src/lib.rs の review 系 CliApp メソッドに内部実装を記述する（T002 の Err("not implemented") stub を実装に置き換える）。
apps/cli/src/commands/review/compose_v2.rs の re-export shim を削除し、callers が CliApp を直接呼ぶように変更する。
この時点で apps/cli の review submodule は infrastructure::review_v2 を直接 import しない（Cargo.toml 依存はまだ残る）(CN-02, CN-05)。

sections.title: 残りの全コマンドファミリーを CliApp facade 経由に移行（guard / hook / domain / git / track+tddd / verify / pr / make 非 review 部分）
description: persist_commit_hash_for_track を libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs から apps/cli-composition/src/review_v2/ へ移動する（composition 層の関数であるため）。移動後、libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs は AC-07 に列挙されている adapter 型のみを公開する状態になる (IN-05, AC-07)。
T002 でスタブ化した CliApp メソッドのうち review_v2 以外の全ファミリー（guard / hook / domain / git / track+tddd / verify / pr / make 非 review 部分）の内部実装を apps/cli-composition/src/<group>/ 配下のモジュールに記述する (IN-03)。

apps/cli/src/commands/{guard.rs / hook.rs / domain.rs / git.rs / verify.rs / pr.rs / pr_tests.rs / make.rs / track/} の infrastructure:: / usecase:: 直接 import を cli_composition::CliApp メソッド呼び出しに置き換える (IN-03)。
この時点で apps/cli/src/ 配下の全ファイルから infrastructure:: / usecase:: の直接 import がなくなる（Cargo.toml 依存はまだ残る）(CN-05)。

sections.title: enforcement flip: architecture-rules / deny.toml / Cargo.toml 一括更新（最終コミット）
description: libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/mod.rs が adapter 型のみを公開していることを確認する（T003 で cli_composition.rs を削除、T005 で persist_commit_hash_for_track を cli-composition へ移動済み）。

apps/cli/Cargo.toml からワークスペースレイヤー依存の infrastructure / usecase を削除し、cli_composition のみのワークスペースレイヤー依存を残す（clap / anyhow 等の外部クレート依存は変更しない）— T004-T005 で全 infrastructure:: / usecase:: import を CliApp 経由に置き換え済みのため Cargo.toml 依存のみ残っている状態 (IN-04)。
architecture-rules.json の cli.may_depend_on を中間状態の ["infrastructure","usecase","cli_composition"]（T003 で設定済み）から最終状態の ["cli_composition"] に変更する (IN-04, CN-01)。

deny.toml を最終更新（T001 の中間状態から最終状態へ）: infrastructure の wrappers から "cli" を除き ["cli_composition"] のみにする (IN-08)、usecase の wrappers から "cli" を除き ["infrastructure","cli_composition"] にする、domain の wrappers は ["usecase","infrastructure","cli_composition"] のまま維持、cli_composition の ban エントリ wrappers=["cli"] を追加する (IN-08)。
cargo make ci（fmt-check + clippy + nextest + deny + check-layers + verify-* すべて）を通して AC-04..AC-14 を確認する (IN-07, CN-04, AC-04..AC-14)。
